# chalk_cluster_timescale (Resource)

Chalk cluster TimescaleDB resource



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) Environment ID for the TimescaleDB cluster

### Optional

- `backup_bucket` (String) S3/GCS bucket for backups
- `backup_gcp_service_account` (String) GCP service account for backups
- `backup_iam_role_arn` (String) IAM role ARN for backups
- `bootstrap_cloud_resources` (Boolean) Whether to bootstrap cloud resources
- `connection_pool_max_connections` (String) Maximum connections for the connection pool
- `connection_pool_replicas` (Number) Number of connection pool replicas
- `connection_pool_size` (String) Connection pool size
- `database_name` (String) Database name
- `database_replicas` (Number) Number of database replicas
- `dns_hostname` (String) DNS hostname
- `gateway_id` (String) Gateway ID for the TimescaleDB
- `gateway_port` (Number) Gateway port for the TimescaleDB
- `instance_type` (String) Instance type
- `internal` (Boolean) Whether the database is internal
- `namespace` (String) Kubernetes namespace
- `node_selector` (Map of String) Node selector labels
- `nodepool` (String) Nodepool name
- `postgres_parameters` (Map of String) PostgreSQL configuration parameters
- `request` (Attributes) Resource requests (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--request))
- `secret_name` (String) Kubernetes secret name for database credentials
- `service_type` (String) Kubernetes service type
- `storage` (String) Storage size (e.g., '100Gi')
- `storage_class` (String) Kubernetes storage class
- `timescale_image` (String) TimescaleDB Docker image

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) TimescaleDB identifier

<a id="nestedatt--request"></a>
### Nested Schema for `request`

Optional:

- `cpu` (String) CPU resource specification
- `ephemeral_storage` (String) Ephemeral storage resource specification
- `memory` (String) Memory resource specification
- `storage` (String) Storage resource specification
